title: ceratostylis lombasangensis
intro: Ceratostylis lombasangensis, also known as the Lombasang orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is reported to have medicinal properties, particularly in the traditional medicine of Palawan, Philippines, where it is used to treat fever and cough. The health benefits of Ceratostylis lombasangensis include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared by boiling the leaves and roots in water to create a herbal remedy, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
